'''Scythe 3''' was a modified [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln starfighter]] that was stationed aboard the second [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] as part of [[Scythe Squadron/Legends|Scythe Squadron]].

Piloted by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Hebsly/Legends|Hebsly]], Scythe 3 featured [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] specifically enhanced for destroying asteroids in the [[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]] and [[P-w702 ion maneuvering jet]]s added by Death Star technicians to improve performance. Scythe 3 pursued [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] starfighters outside [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*{{Film|VI}} {{1st}}
